name: M4A1消音版 | 苔藓石英
descriptionEn: With a smaller magazine than its unmuffled counterpart, the silenced M4A1 provides quieter shots with less recoil and better accuracy. It has been painted with dark green metallic paint and uses a crystallizing mask to create a pattern. Everyone wants to make an impact
descriptionZh: 消音版 M4A1 相对于它那没有消音器的同行来说弹匣更小，枪声也较为“沉默”，还拥有更小的后坐力和更高的精准度。 枪身采用暗绿色金属涂料喷涂，并用结晶外膜制作图案。 谁都想改变战局
